theme.description: Cinematic, expensive, moody, frictionless. Focus on titanium, deep space blacks, and optical clarity glassmorphism to sell a premium tech device.

fonts.heading: Cabinet Grotesk
fonts.import_instructions: Import Cabinet Grotesk via Fontshare CDN and Manrope via Google Fonts.

layout.marketing_grid: Bento Grid (Mode A) - Asymmetric, gap-8 to gap-12. Large hero spanning multiple rows for showcasing the iPhone.
layout.dashboard_grid: Control Room Grid (Mode B) - gap-4, precise metrics alignment, border-collapse styles for Admin/Inventory.
layout.mobile_constraints: Images MUST NOT exceed 80vh on mobile devices.

surfaces_and_components.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10 (Use for sticky navs, floating action bars, and cart overlays).
surfaces_and_components.cards: bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/10 rounded-3xl overflow-hidden hover:bg-white/[0.04] transition-colors duration-300.
surfaces_and_components.buttons: rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all. Primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-neutral-200. Secondary: bg-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/20.
surfaces_and_components.inputs: Shadcn based. Customize to bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl focus:border-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white/50.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: MANDATORY: Lenis smooth scrolling for a premium, weighty feel. This is non-negotiable for a high-end tech site.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle scale-up (scale-[1.02]) for bento cards. Text color shifts to pure white on active states.
motion_and_interactions.animations: Framer motion staggered fade-up for product grids. Scrollytelling triggers for high-res images to create cinematic entrances.

assets.icons: @phosphor-icons/react (Use Duotone or Light weight for a premium, refined feel)

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'lenis' for smooth scrolling.

Build the landing/product pages with custom HTML/Tailwind to create overlapping bento grids and heavy scrollytelling. Do not rely heavily on standard Shadcn 'Card' components for the creative marketing layouts.
For Checkout, Admin Dashboard, and User Orders, heavily utilize customized Shadcn UI components (Forms, Tables, Dialogs) but strip out the generic Vercel aesthetic to match the dark titanium theme.
Make sure all interactive elements include 'data-testid' (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button', data-testid='checkout-form-submit').
Use pure white text for primary headings and muted gray (#A1A1A6) for paragraphs. No purple/teal gradients anywhere.
Do not use generic Inter font for headings; use Cabinet Grotesk for a premium tech vibe.
Ensure dark mode is the default and ONLY mode.
Write ALL components in .jsx or .js, NOT .tsx.
Follow the 'Universal Design Rules' strictly: nested radii, hue consistency, accessible contrasts.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure pure white text on #050505 passes APCA standards.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: Required on all buttons, forms, and key informational elements. Kebab-case, role-based.
